## Type of Change

- [ ] New document / section (feat)
- [ ] Revision based on feedback (update)
- [ ] Review cycle changes (review)
- [ ] Correction / typo fix (fix)
- [ ] Repo maintenance (chore)

## Author Checklist

- [ ] Document follows the agreed template/format
- [ ] All requirements are stated in clear, unambiguous language
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable (for User Stories)
- [ ] No spelling or grammar errors
- [ ] File is saved in the correct `docs/` subfolder
- [ ] Branch name follows the convention (`type/sprint-description`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the convention
- [ ] Labels have been applied to this PR
- [ ] Related issue is linked (`Closes #xxx`)

## Reviewer Checklist (BA Lead)

- [ ] Content is complete for this sprint scope
- [ ] Requirements are traceable to business goals
- [ ] No ambiguous or gold-plating language
- [ ] Consistent with previously approved documents
- [ ] Ready to merge to `develop`

<!-- Any context the reviewer should know before reading the diff -->
